content: Hi all. I am looking for some sort of a rust api that i can give a memory address + size, and it will map it into io memory of a specified device, doing all necessary iommu bits. Something similar to dma_map_resource, or a way to create a dma::CoherentAllocation at a specified address. Is there something like that out there?

Hej,
on C side that would be iommu_map*(). I haven't seen rust bindings for that. The gpu drivers only wrap io_pagetbl and implement the (io)mmu bits themself since they use per context VMs.
chaos_princess has marked this topic as resolved.
